revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''大山祇神社'''（おおやまずみじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢にある[[神社]]である。 ==祭神== *[[大...'
revision.text:
'''大山祇神社'''（おおやまずみじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢にある[[神社]]である。
==祭神== *[[大山祇命]] *岩長比売命 *[[木花咲耶姫命]]
==歴史== この神社は、社伝によれば[[778年]]（[[宝亀]]9年）に創建されたとされる。
==文化財== *西会津町指定天然記念物 **宇陀帰山大山祇神社参道杉並木と境内社木
==主な行事== *[[6月]]中 大山まつり *[[9月9日]]・[[9月19日]]・[[9月29日]] 例祭
==所在地== *福島県耶麻郡西会津町野沢字大久保甲1445-2
==外部リンク== *[http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html 大山祇神社サイト]
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおやますみしんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:西会津町]] {{shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: yomi: 祭られているのが「オオヤマツミ」のため。, add photo, add template
revision.text:
'''大山祇神社'''（おおやまづみじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢にある[[神社]]である。 {{統合文字|祇}} {{神社 |名称=大山祇神社 |画像=[[ファイル:Oyamazumi Shrine, Fukushima, Japan.jpg|280px]]
大山祇神社 奥宮 |所在地=福島県耶麻郡西会津町野沢字大久保1445-2 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|37|32|10.36|N|139|36|19.80|E|scale:20000}} |祭神=[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] |社格= |創建=[[宝亀]]9年（[[778年]]） |本殿= |別名= |札所等= |例祭=例大祭（[[9月9日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月9日]]・[[9月19日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月19日]]・[[9月29日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月29日]]）
大山祭（[[6月]]）
元旦祭（[[1月1日 (旧暦)|旧暦1月1日]]）
月次祭（毎月9日・19日・29日） |神事= }} ==祭神== *[[大山祇命]] *岩長比売命 *[[木花咲耶姫命]] ==歴史== この神社は、社伝によれば[[778年]]（[[宝亀]]9年）に創建されたとされる。 ==文化財== *西会津町指定天然記念物 **宇陀帰山大山祇神社参道杉並木と境内社木 ==主な行事== *[[6月]]中　大山まつり *[[9月9日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月9日]]・[[9月19日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月19日]]・[[9月29日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月29日]]　例大祭 ==所在地== *福島県耶麻郡西会津町野沢字大久保甲1445-2 ==外部リンク== *[http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html 大山祇神社サイト] {{DEFAULTSORT:おおやまつみしんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:西会津町]] {{shinto-stub}}

月次祭（毎月9日・19日・29日） |神事= 不詳 |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Fukushima Prefecture|label=大山祇神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''大山祇神社'''（おおやまづみじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢にある[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * [[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] * [[イワナガヒメ|岩長比売命]] * [[コノハナノサクヤビメ|木花咲耶姫命]] == 歴史 == {{節スタブ|date= 2024年6月25日 (火) 04:13 (UTC)}} この[[神社]]は社伝によれば、[[奈良時代]][[wikt:後期|後期]]の[[778年]]（[[宝亀]]9年）に創建されたとされる。 == 文化財 == * 西会津町指定天然記念物 ** 宇陀帰山大山祇神社の参道杉並木と境内社木。 == 主な行事 == * [[6月]]中 - 大山まつり * [[9月9日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月9日]]・[[9月19日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月19日]]・[[9月29日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月29日]] - [[例祭|例大祭]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html 大山祇神社 公式サイト] {{リンク切れ|date= 2024年6月25日 (火) 04:13 (UTC)|title= 404 File Not Foundと表示されている。}} * [http://www.aizu-reichi.gr.jp/index.html 会津寺社仏閣 会津六詣出] {{ja icon}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおやまつみしんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:西会津町の建築物]] [[Category:西会津町の歴史]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

Monthly Festivals (on the 9th, 19th, and 29th of every month) |Sacred Rituals= |Map={{Location map|Japan Fukushima Prefecture|label=Oyamazumi Shrine (大山祇神社)|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a {{ill|Shinto Shrine|ja|神社}} located in Nozawa, {{ill|Nishiaizu Town|ja|西会津町}}, {{ill|Yama District|ja|耶麻郡}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. ==Enshrined Deities== * {{ill|Ooyamatsumi|ja|オオヤマツミ|1=Ōyamatsumi|lt=Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=大山祇命}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=岩長比売命}} * {{ill|Konohananosakuyahime|ja|コノハナノサクヤビメ|lt=Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=木花咲耶姫命}} ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|778|ja|778th year }} ({{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During {{ill|June|ja|6月}}: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * [http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html Oyamazumi Shrine Official Website] * [http://www.aizu-reichi.gr.jp/index.html Aizu Temples, Shrines, and Buddhist Temples – Aizu Rokumairi] {{Shinto Navigation}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Fukushima Prefecture]] Faith}}[[Category:Iwanaga Faith]] [[Category:大山祇神社 (西会津町)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Oyamatsumi Shrine (Nishi Aizu)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely {{統合文字|祇}} {{神社 |名称=大山祇神社 |画像=[[ファイル:Oyamazumi Shrine, Fukushima, Japan.jpg|280px|大山祇神社 奥宮]]
大山祇神社 奥宮
[[ファイル:Okumiya, Oyamazumi Shrine, Fukushima, Japan.jpg|280px|大山祇神社 御本社（奥宮）]]
大山祇神社 御本社（奥宮） |所在地=[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢字大久保1445-2 |位置={{Coord|37|32|10|N|139|36|20|E|region:JP-07_type:landmark_scale:20000|display=inline,title|name=大山祇神社}}| |祭神=[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] |社格= |創建=[[宝亀]]9年（[[778年]]） |本殿= |別名= |札所等=会津六詣出 |例祭=例大祭（[[9月9日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月9日]]・[[9月19日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月19日]]・[[9月29日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月29日]]）
大山祭（[[6月]]）
元旦祭（[[1月1日 (旧暦)|旧暦1月1日]]）
月次祭（毎月9日・19日・29日） |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Fukushima Prefecture|label=大山祇神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''大山祇神社'''（おおやまづみじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[耶麻郡]][[西会津町]]野沢にある[[神社]]である。 ==祭神== *[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] *[[イワナガヒメ|岩長比売命]] *[[コノハナノサクヤビメ|木花咲耶姫命]] ==歴史== この神社は、社伝によれば[[778年]]（[[宝亀]]9年）に創建されたとされる。 ==文化財== *西会津町指定天然記念物 **宇陀帰山大山祇神社参道杉並木と境内社木{{Cite web |和書 |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=西会津町の文化財（町指定）|website=西会津町HP |publisher=西会津町 |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22 |archiveurl= |archivedate= |url-status= |url-status-date=}} ==主な行事== *[[6月]]中：大山まつり *[[9月9日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月9日]]・[[9月19日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月19日]]・[[9月29日 (旧暦)|旧暦9月29日]]：例大祭 ==脚注== {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html 大山祇神社サイト] *[http://www.aizu-reichi.gr.jp/index.html 会津寺社仏閣 会津六詣出] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおやまつみしんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:西会津町の建築物]] [[Category:西会津町の歴史]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

'''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|qq=}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|qq=}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|qq=}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|qq=|1=ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840325}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|qq=|1=19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840324}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|qq=|1=29th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840263}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * [http://www.ooyamazumi.net/index.html Oyamazumi Shrine Official Website] * '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|1=ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840325}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|1=19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840324}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|1=29th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840263}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|1=ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840325}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|1=19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840324}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|1=29th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840263}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto Shrine]] located in Nozawa, [[:en:Nishiaizu, Fukushima|Nishiaizu Town]], [[:en:Yama District, Fukushima|Yama District]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. ==Enshrined Deities== * [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto]] * [[:en:Konohanasakuya-hime|Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto]] ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in [[:en:778|778]] ([[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During [[:en:June|June]]: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|1=ninth day of the ninth month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840325}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|1=19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840324}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|1=29th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840263}}: Annual Grand Festival ==Notes== {{Notes Help}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== * |deity={{ill|Ōyamatsumi|WD=Q386563|1=Ōyamatsumi}} }} '''Oyamazumi Shrine''' (大山祇神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nozawa, {{ill|Nishiaizu, Fukushima|en|Nishiaizu, Fukushima|WD=Q784402|lt=Nishiaizu Town|1=Nishiaizu, Fukushima}}, {{ill|Yama District, Fukushima|en|Yama District, Fukushima|WD=Q1205228|lt=Yama District|1=Yama District, Fukushima}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|WD=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}. ==Enshrined Deities== * {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|en|Ōyamatsumi|WD=Q386563|lt=Oyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|en|Iwanaga-hime|WD=Q8191705|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|1=Iwanaga-hime}} * {{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|en|Konohanasakuya-hime|WD=Q1781862|lt=Konohananosakuyahime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} ==History== According to its tradition, this shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|778|en|778|WD=Q30452|lt=778|1=778}} ({{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 9). ==Cultural Properties== * Designated Natural Monument of Nishiaizu Town ** Cedar Avenue along the Uda Pilgrimage Route to Oyamazumi Shrine and the Shrine Trees within the precincts{{Cite web |type=Japanese publication |url=https://www.town.nishiaizu.fukushima.jp/soshiki/10/896.html |title=Cultural Properties of Nishiaizu Town (Town Designated) |website=Nishiaizu Town Official Website |publisher=Nishiaizu Town |language=ja |date= |accessdate=2024-08-22}} ==Major Events== * During {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}}: Oyamazumi Festival * {{ill|Old Calendar September 9|ja|9月9日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 9|lt_ja=旧暦9月9日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 9|1=September 9 (Lunisolar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840325}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 19|ja|9月19日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 19|lt_ja=旧暦9月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 19|1=September 19 (Lunisolar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840324}}・{{ill|Old Calendar September 29|ja|9月29日 (旧暦)|lt=Old Calendar September 29|lt_ja=旧暦9月29日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Calendar September 29|1=September 29 (Lunisolar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q840263}}: Annual Grand
